problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
